valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: This logical model describes the Visit of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
This logical model describes the Service of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
This logical model describes the PersonV40 of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
This logical model describes the ParameterV40 of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
This logical model describes the Diagnosis of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
This logical model describes the Treatment of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
This logical model describes the ServiceAssignment of 'Leistungsschnittstelle ALIS Version 5.1'.
Data Type Boolean
Data Type Text
Data Type Decimal
Data Type UnsignedInt
Data Type Date
Data Type DateTime
Base definition for the ChargeItem resource in the context of ALIS-Connect.
Base definition for the Patient resource in the context of ALIS-Connect.
Base definition for the Encounter resource in the context of ALIS-Connect.
Base definition for the Condition resource in the context of ALIS-Connect.
This extension describes the SessionID.
This extension describes the OrderID.
This extension describes the Form.
This extension describes the TerminationVisit and TerminationReason.
This extension describes the ParameterV40 with ParamTyp and ParamValue.
This code system defines the PersonTyp.
This code system defines the ParamTyp.

Externally maintained ambulatory physician tariff catalogue (LKAAT) published by OAAT. Declared as not-present: its codes are referenced from this IG but not enumerated here, because the catalogue is owned and published externally.

Code system for Swiss medical specialty areas (Fachbereiche) used in ambulatory care settings. Based on the regulation document 'Reglement Fachbereiche inkl. Liste der Fachbereiche' valid from January 1, 2026. Declared as fragment: only the codes actually referenced in this IG are listed here.
This value set defines the PersonTyp.
This value set defines the ParamTyp, which are displayed via CH ALIS Extension ParameterV40.
Mapping of the ALIS Visit logical model to the FHIR Encounter, Patient and ChargeItem profiles.
Mapping of the ALIS Service logical model to the FHIR ChargeItem and Condition profiles.
Mapping of the ALIS Diagnosis logical model to the FHIR Condition profile.
Mapping of the ALIS PersonV40 logical model to the FHIR ChargeItem.performer element.

Mapping of the ALIS ParameterV40 logical model to the FHIR ParameterV40 extension (on ChargeItem). Specific ParamTyp values (BMI, Billable, Amount, SLIndicationCode) are mapped to dedicated ChargeItem elements instead of the generic ParameterV40 extension.
Mapping of the ALIS ServiceAssignment logical model to the FHIR ServiceAssignment extension (on ChargeItem).
Mapping of the ALIS SessionSectionB logical model to the FHIR SessionAnnexB extension (on ChargeItem).
This extension describes the DiagnosisConfidential.
This extension describes the ItemNumber (Laufnummer).
This extension describes the OrderDate.
This extension describes the RefItemNumber (Referenz Laufnummer zu Hauptleistung).
This extension describes the SectionCode.
This extension describes ServiceAssignment
This extension describes the ServiceItemErrorCode (Fehlercode).
This extension describes SessionAnnexB
This extension describes the TPValue.

ValueSet for Swiss medical specialty areas (Fachbereiche) used in ambulatory care settings. Based on the regulation document 'Reglement Fachbereiche inkl. Liste der Fachbereiche' valid from January 1, 2026. Declared as fragment: only the codes actually referenced in this IG are listed here.

Externally maintained ambulatory physician tariff catalogue (LKAAT) published by OAAT. Declared as not-present: its codes are referenced from this IG but not enumerated here, because the catalogue is owned and published externally.
